name: Web Browser Gold Price
description: Open a browser, search for current gold price in Germany (EUR), and report result with source and screenshot.

steps.action: Open a web browser and open a new tab.
steps.expectedResult: Browser is open with a new tab.

steps.action: Search for the current gold price in Germany (in EUR).
steps.expectedResult: Search results show current gold price in EUR for Germany.

steps.action: Report the gold price and the source (website name or URL) in your task summary.
steps.expectedResult: Task summary contains gold price and source (website name or URL).

steps.action: Include a screenshot of the browser showing the result.
steps.expectedResult: Screenshot of the browser with the result is included.

deliverables.screenshotSubject: browser showing the gold price result
